overall.description: First-person exploration through a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077), walking from a sunlit urban alley with an 'All Foods' sign toward and under a concrete highway overpass, discovering a burning vehicle and debris field beneath the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban alley approaching highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sunlit overgrown alley toward the concrete overpass

entered.detail: large commercial sign for All Foods store with orange and yellow coloring mounted on building
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
metal electrical pylon with multiple power lines stretching across the sky
massive concrete highway bridge spanning across the path ahead
tall dry grass and weeds growing through cracks in the asphalt pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban alley with an All Foods sign visible on the right. The camera moves forward past a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left, approaching a large highway overpass in the distance. Overgrown vegetation lines the path through the cracked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass beneath highway with abandoned vehicles

events.description: entering the shadow of the highway overpass, sunlight fades significantly as the camera moves under the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the dimly lit underpass beneath the highway structure

entered.detail: derelict vehicles parked along the sides under the bridge, covered in dust and graffiti
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway deck above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadow beneath the highway overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim shelter. Abandoned cars line the sides of the path, and massive concrete pillars support the bridge overhead. The All Foods sign and power pylon disappear from view as the camera moves deeper under the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: burning vehicle debris field under highway overpass

events.description: burning vehicle with large flames comes into view ahead under the bridge, illuminating the area with firelight

agents.ego_description: approaching the burning vehicle and observing the scattered debris and encampment under the bridge

notable_agents.action: person standing near the burning fire, observing the flames or warming themselves

entered.detail: vehicle engulfed in bright orange flames emitting thick black smoke
large pile of blue garbage bags and discarded containers stacked against the wall
scattered cardboard boxes, blue barrels, and makeshift shelter materials

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a burning vehicle deep under the overpass, the fire casting flickering orange light on the concrete walls. Piles of trash bags and homeless encampment debris litter the area. A person stands near the flames in the distance as the camera moves closer to the intense fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban alley into the dim, oppressive shadow of a highway overpass. It begins by moving past an All Foods sign and graffiti-covered walls, following a path of cracked asphalt and overgrown vegetation toward a distant concrete bridge. As the camera passes beneath the structure, the bright daylight vanishes, replaced by a dim shelter defined by massive concrete pillars and rows of abandoned cars. The scene then shifts deeper into the gloom, where the environment becomes cluttered with trash bags and encampment debris before turning toward a burning vehicle. Finally, the camera approaches the intense fire, which casts flickering orange light across the concrete walls as a lone figure stands in the distance.
